headline: Strength Seen in Innovative Industrial Properties (IIPR): Can Its 5.7% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: Innovative Industrial Properties (IIPR) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in FFO estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

headline: Alexandria Q1 Preview: Expecting Positive Progress On Reset, 'Strong Buy' Long-Term
summary: Alexandria Real Estate remains a beaten-down REIT that is trading at a material discount to its long-term prospects. Learn why ARE stock is a strong buy.
